title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks defined authentication mechanisms, potentially allowing attackers to impersonate legitimate users or systems. Without multi-factor authentication (MFA) or robust password policies, attackers could easily gain unauthorized access.
attack_vector: Exploiting weak or missing authentication logic.  An attacker could craft malicious requests mimicking valid user sessions or bypass authentication entirely.
mitigations: Implement strong authentication mechanisms, including MFA.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Utilize a secure authentication protocol (e.g., OAuth 2.0, SAML).
